fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Modify Submitted Reports
fields.tooltip: Specifies if users can modify VAT reports that have been submitted to the tax authorities. If the field is left blank, users must create a corrective or supplementary VAT report instead.

fields.name: VAT Return No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that is used for VAT return records.

fields.name: VAT Return Period No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that is used for the VAT return period records.

fields.name: Report Version
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT report version that is used for the VAT reporting periods.

fields.name: Update Period Job Frequency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the job frequency for an automatic update of the VAT return periods.

fields.name: Manual Receive Period CU ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit ID associated with a manual receipt of the VAT return periods.

fields.name: Manual Receive Period CU Cap
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit caption associated with a manual receipt of the VAT return periods.

fields.name: Auto Receive Period CU ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit ID associated with an automatic receipt of the VAT return periods. You can only edit this field if the Update Period Job Frequency field contains Never.

fields.name: Auto Receive Period CU Cap
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit caption associated with an automatic receipt of the VAT return periods.

fields.name: Receive Submitted Return CU ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit ID associated with a receipt of the submitted VAT returns.

fields.name: Receive Submitted Return CUCap
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit caption associated with a receipt of the submitted VAT returns.

fields.name: Period Reminder Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that is used to notify about an open VAT report period with an upcoming due date.

fields.name: Report VAT Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the VAT base must be calculated and shown to the user in the VAT reports.

fields.name: Report VAT Note
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the VAT report must include the contents of the Note field on the relevant report statement lines.
